diagrams.title: HDLC Frame Structure
diagrams.description: Complete structure of an HDLC frame showing all fields in sequence
diagrams.purpose: Understanding frame composition and field functions

diagrams.title: HDLC Frame Types
diagrams.description: Classification of frames into I-frames, S-frames, and U-frames with examples
elements: I-frames - Information transfer with N(S), N(R)
S-frames - Supervisory functions (RR, RNR, REJ, SREJ)
U-frames - Unnumbered functions (SABM, DISC, UA, DM, FRMR)
diagrams.purpose: Differentiating frame types and their control field formats

diagrams.title: Bit Stuffing Process
diagrams.description: Process of inserting '0' after five consecutive '1's in data

diagrams.title: HDLC Configuration Modes
diagrams.description: Three station configurations: Point-to-Point, Multipoint, and Looped
diagrams.purpose: Understanding different network topologies supported by HDLC

visuals.title: High Level Data Link Control
visuals.description: Visual diagram for high level data link control
